page: Google Cloud Platform c3-highmem-192-metal is a bare-metal server configured with 192 vCPUs and 1.5 TB of DDR5 memory. Powered by dedicated Intel Xeon 8481C processors running at 4.0 GHz across 96 physical cores, this architecture supports hyper-threading with two threads per core. The memory subsystem operates at 5 GHz, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or integrated GPUs.

Benchmark data shows top-tier multi-core CPU performance, with stress-ng multi-core and PassMark CPU scores placing in the top 10%. The DDR5 memory subsystem achieves top-tier read and write bandwidth, reaching 13142.62 GB/sec for cached small blocks and 464.93 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. Advanced instruction sets, including AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions, drive top-tier results in cryptographic encryption and database operations, alongside strong performance in LLM inference prompt processing for both 7B and 70B models.

As a bare-metal instance with high resource density, the c3-highmem-192-metal offers qualitative cost efficiency for workloads requiring direct hardware access without virtualization overhead. The combination of high-frequency dedicated cores and massive memory bandwidth makes it highly suitable for large-scale database operations, high-throughput web serving, and memory-intensive compute tasks such as software compilation and vector-based mathematical modeling.
description: Google Cloud Platform c3-highmem-192-metal is a bare-metal server featuring 192 vCPUs and 1.5 TB of DDR5 memory. Powered by dedicated Intel Xeon 8481C processors operating at 4.0 GHz, this instance delivers top-tier multi-core CPU performance and exceptional memory bandwidth, reaching 464.93 GB/sec for uncached large blocks. The architecture includes advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and Intel AMX, which accelerate cryptography and database operations. Lacking local storage and GPUs, this server is optimized for memory-intensive, high-throughput compute workloads. It is highly suited for large-scale database operations, heavy software compilation, and CPU-based machine learning inference.

tagline: A bare-metal server combining high-frequency dedicated processors with massive DDR5 memory bandwidth for demanding enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 192 dedicated vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8481C processors at 4.0 GHz
1.5 TB of high-speed 5 GHz DDR5 memory
Top-tier multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth benchmark performance
Intel AMX and AVX-512 extensions for accelerated cryptography and matrix math
Best suited for large-scale databases, software compilation, and CPU-based LLM inference
